name: Walk Wave Machine
shortDescription: A low-impact cardio machine utilizing a unique lateral gliding motion to engage lower body muscles and improve endurance.
instructions: Step onto the wave machine and grip the handles if available. Begin with a slow pace, moving feet in a side-to-side, skating motion. Gradually increase resistance and speed as you feel comfortable.
steps: Step onto the machine and position feet on pedals.
Initiate movement by pushing one leg outward while the other follows.
Maintain a rhythmic, lateral gliding motion.
Continue for the desired time or intensity.
breathing: Keep breath steady and controlled throughout.
